mapper.select:
SELECT history_seq AS historySeq, user_id AS userId, event_type AS eventType, fail_reason AS failReason, ip_address AS ipAddress, user_agent AS userAgent, session_id AS sessionId, created_at AS createdAt FROM login_history WHERE 1=1
AND user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%')
AND created_at >= #{fromDate}
AND created_at < DATE_ADD(#{toDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY created_at DESC, history_seq DESC LIMIT 1000

SELECT SESSION_ID AS sessionId, PRINCIPAL_NAME AS userId, FROM_UNIXTIME(CREATION_TIME / 1000) AS creationTime, FROM_UNIXTIME(LAST_ACCESS_TIME / 1000) AS lastAccessTime, FROM_UNIXTIME(EXPIRY_TIME / 1000) AS expiryTime FROM SPRING_SESSION WHERE EXPIRY_TIME > UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000 AND PRINCIPAL_NAME IS NOT NULL ORDER BY LAST_ACCESS_TIME DESC
